description: build_rag_workflow_payload() populates generation.model from job.llm_model when no structured RAG telemetry is present
invalidation_impact: If false, the Model card would show '—' even when a model was used. Low severity — still a correct fallback.

description: diagnostics.vision_fallback_count is only present in the payload dict when count > 0 (absent otherwise)
invalidation_impact: If false (count always present), the `|default:0` filter in the template handles it gracefully — no rendering bug.

description: SVG width='100%' + existing viewBox='0 0 900 160' scales proportionally without clipping in all modern browsers
evidence: SVG 1.1 spec; supported Chrome 4+, Firefox 3.5+, Safari 3.1+
invalidation_impact: If a target browser doesn't support it, the SVG collapses to 0 width. Low risk given project audience (researchers using modern browsers).

description: No Python/view changes are needed because all required data fields are already populated by build_rag_workflow_payload()
evidence: Confirmed by reading views.py:559-584 — all four missing fields are present in the return dict
invalidation_impact: If a field is unexpectedly missing, Django template will render the |default fallback — no crash, but field remains blank.
